# Spires Digital

> Spires Digital is a founder-led ecommerce growth agency run from Guernsey at https://spiresdigital.com. It connects acquisition, conversion, retention and measurement to commercial outcomes.

## Canonical identity

- Website: https://spiresdigital.com/
- Email: jack@spiresdigital.com
- Based in: Guernsey, Channel Islands
- Service area: ecommerce brands across the UK and beyond

## What Spires Digital does

Spires Digital works across one ecommerce growth system:

- Acquire: Google Shopping and PPC, Meta ads, ecommerce SEO and affiliate management
- Convert: conversion rate optimisation and Shopify customer journeys
- Retain: email, lifecycle and repeat-purchase strategy
- Measure: analytics, tracking and attribution

The operating approach starts with store economics and the main commercial constraint. Channel-reported metrics are considered alongside margin, customer acquisition cost, conversion rate, average order value, repeat purchase and contribution.

## Pricing

Spires Digital does not publish fixed service prices. Every potential engagement starts with a consultation to understand the commercial goal, current setup, platform and data complexity, and delivery requirements. If there is a strong fit, Spires Digital provides a clear written scope and price before any work begins.

## Free tools

The tools work without an email gate. Calculator inputs are processed in the visitor's browser.

- Ecommerce profit and break-even ROAS calculator: https://spiresdigital.com/tools/ecommerce-profit-calculator/
- Channel budget planner: https://spiresdigital.com/tools/channel-budget-planner/
- Ecommerce growth assessment: https://spiresdigital.com/tools/growth-assessment/
- Google Ads VAT decision guide: https://spiresdigital.com/tools/google-ads-vat-guide/
- Paid media waste estimator: https://spiresdigital.com/tools/paid-media-waste-estimator/
- Ecommerce Google Ads audit checklist: https://spiresdigital.com/tools/google-ads-audit-checklist/

The VAT guide is educational and not tax advice. Financial outputs are estimates based on user-supplied assumptions and are not promises of performance.

## Trust and evidence

- The agency is founder-led; Jack Chittenden leads diagnosis, commercial strategy and major optimisation decisions.
- The website states more than 15 years of digital marketing experience, more than £10m of cumulative managed advertising spend and more than 150 campaigns delivered. These are experience-scale claims, not an average result or guarantee.
- Client outcomes retain their commercial claims and show the baseline, intervention, evidence window, measurement basis and relevant limitations. Client identities remain anonymised where agreements require confidentiality.
- Named references may be arranged during a qualified buying process when the relevant client has given permission.
- Shopify Partner, AWIN Certified Agency, Meta Business Partner and Microsoft Advertising Partner badges are explained as supporting platform signals. Programme context and additional public certification history are linked from Jack Chittenden’s profile.
- Articles identify Jack Chittenden as author, link to his profile and publish an editorial and corrections route where platform, cost or tax information may change.

## Location accuracy

- Guernsey base: https://spiresdigital.com/locations/guernsey/
- Lichfield service page: https://spiresdigital.com/locations/lichfield/

Spires Digital does not claim a Lichfield office. The Lichfield page describes remote service for ecommerce brands in Lichfield and Staffordshire.
